input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Mount Sinai Hospital. There are 14 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "general", "count": 6, "message": "6 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 6, "message": "6 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 334, "current_utilization": 22, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto Western Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-western", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto Western Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Mount Sinai Hospital has 14 incoming patients, including a cluster of 6 respiratory patients for whom an isolation protocol should be considered due to a possible outbreak, and 6 general patients requiring monitoring. While capacity is stable for the next two hours, consider diverting CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Toronto Western, all at 50% capacity, to optimize resource allocation.
